testcase.name: test_get_customers_template
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfc002_auth_ai_import.py:346: in test_get_customers_template assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get customers template failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get customers template failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
